# Optional dependencies
# Install after base and torch extensions
#
# Installation:
#   macOS: pip3 install -r requirements-optional.txt
#   Linux/Colab: pip install -r requirements-optional.txt

deepchem

rdkit-pypi  # Note: rdkit is typically better installed via conda
